message:
refactor(key-sequence): simplify timeout handling with explicit caller responsibility

Removed the internal check_timeout_internal() method and its implicit
timeout check within feed(). The interpreter now requires callers to
explicitly call check_timeout() (e.g., on tick) to flush expired
sequences.

This change:
- Eliminates complexity from feed() around timeout/flush ordering
- Makes timeout behavior predictable and testable
- Documents the caller's responsibility in method docs
- Ensures the completing key is included in EmitSequence.keys

The previous implicit timeout check was problematic because it tried
to handle timeout expiry and new key processing in a single call,
leading to subtle ordering bugs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
